scope: bounded in-repo reference integration evidence for S12

integrations.marker: reference-integration: api worker audit projection verified

gates.claim: The example submits host tasks through the public host-dispatch v2 seam.
The deterministic linear worker drains the accepted API task before the dependent projection task.
Runtime audit append evidence is indexed monotonically and covers admission, dispatch, execution, authz, projection and close events.
A guarded projection read reveals only allowlisted fields and redacts the unlisted field.
The example includes fail-closed controls for missing projection authz and duplicate idempotency.

deferred_claims.reason: M12.1 validates the public API story with the deterministic in-process reference dispatcher; durable queues and distributed lease coordination remain outside this bounded slice.
The M12.1 example is an in-repo executable integration, not an HTTP/database service template.
Retry policy remains host-owned; this slice proves duplicate suppression, not first-class worker retry orchestration.
